label_verbatim: FIRST: The proposed limited partnership name* to be used in this State
rationale: The name the foreign LP will use in Maine (per 31 MRSA §1308.1.A.2 must contain 'Limited Partnership', 'L.P.', or 'LP'). This form does not capture the home-jurisdiction name separately — the certificate of existence required by TENTH attests to the home name. Same key family as LP_MLPA-12A's `entity.maine_assumed_name_for_suffix` schema-gap.

label_verbatim: SECOND: …the fictitious name under which it proposes to apply for authority to do business in the State of Maine is
rationale: Fictitious Maine name under 31 MRSA §1415.1 when the home name is unavailable in Maine. Same key as FICT-4, MLLC-12, LP_MLPA-12A.

Single yes/this-applies checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0; boolean binding. Boolean indicating that Form FICT-4 (Fictitious Name Registration) is bundled. Same key as LP_MLPA-12A, LP_MLPA-9.

label_verbatim: THIRD: …The foreign limited partnership is a limited liability limited partnership.
rationale: Boolean elect-in for LLLP status (per the THIRD footnote, the FIRST name must then contain 'LLLP' or 'L.L.L.P.'). Same key as LP_MLPA-9.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: …This is a professional limited liability limited partnership** qualified pursuant to 31 MRSA §1354.4.
rationale: Boolean elect-in for PLLLP status. Same key as LP_MLPA-9.
First line of the professional-services description (PLLLP only). Indexed line1/line2 mirroring the multi-line widget primitive used elsewhere (amendment.changes_description.lineN on MLPA-13A).
Second line of the professional-services description.
Date the LP was originally organized in its home jurisdiction. Same key as LP_MLPA-12A, LLP_MLLP-12-1.
State or country where the LP was organized. Same key family as LP_MLPA-12A, LLP_MLLP-12-1.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The street and mailing address of the foreign limited partnership's principal office is: (physical location, street – not P.O. Box, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Single-line physical address of the principal office. Same key as LP_MLPA-12A.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: (mailing address if different from above)
rationale: Mailing address of the principal office (when different).

label_verbatim: SIXTH: The street and mailing address of the foreign limited partnership's required office is: (physical location, street – not P.O. Box, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Physical address of the required office in the home jurisdiction (only applicable if home jurisdiction's law requires the LP to maintain a required office). Same key as LP_MLPA-12A.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: (mailing address if different from above)
rationale: Mailing address of the required office (when different).
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1; enum_select value 'commercial'.
CRA Public Number, required when registered_agent.type = 'commercial'.
Name of the commercial registered agent (one of two name slots — the second is for noncommercial). Synth picks whichever is consistent with registered_agent.type.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1; enum_select value 'noncommercial'.
Name of the noncommercial registered agent (alternative slot to Text12). Same canonical key — synth fills exactly one of Text12/Text13 based on registered_agent.type.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code) [registered agent]
rationale: Physical address of the registered agent in Maine (single-line: street, city, state, zip).

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: (mailing address if different from above) [registered agent]
rationale: Mailing address of the registered agent (when different).
Name of the first general partner. Same per-officer roster pattern as LP_MLPA-12A, LP_MLPA-13A.
Address of the first general partner.
Name of the second general partner.
Address of the second general partner.
Name of the third general partner.
Address of the third general partner.

label_verbatim: [ ] Names and addresses of additional general partners are attached as Exhibit _____, and made a part hereof.
rationale: Single yes/this-applies checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1; boolean binding. Boolean opt-in for an exhibit listing additional general partners (4+).
Letter of the exhibit containing additional general partners.
